flags.label: API Key
flags.description: Anthropic API key for direct access.

flags.label: Unix Socket
flags.description: Unix socket for local API connections.

flags.label: API Key File Descriptor
flags.description: File descriptor for reading API key securely.

flags.label: API Key Helper TTL
flags.description: Cache TTL for the API key helper script.

flags.label: Attribution Header
flags.description: Custom attribution header for API requests.

flags.label: Custom OAuth URL
flags.description: Custom OAuth endpoint URL (must be approved).

flags.label: Additional CLAUDE.md Dirs
flags.description: Extra directories to scan for CLAUDE.md files.

flags.label: Auto Compact Window
flags.description: Token threshold for auto-compaction. Lower = more aggressive.

flags.label: Disable Auto Memory
flags.description: Disables auto-memory reads/writes. Removes memory from context.

flags.label: Disable CLAUDE.md Files
flags.description: Drops ALL CLAUDE.md content from system prompt. Nuclear option.

flags.label: Disable Git Instructions
flags.description: Strips built-in git workflow instructions from system prompt.

flags.label: Disable Precompact Skip
flags.description: Forces full compaction pipeline instead of short-circuiting.

flags.label: Enable Away Summary
flags.description: Show summary when returning from idle/away state.

flags.label: Idle Threshold
flags.description: Minutes of inactivity before idle detection fires. Default 75.

flags.label: Idle Token Threshold
flags.description: Token count above which idle detection activates. Default 100000.

flags.label: Max Context Tokens
flags.description: Override max context window token limit (used with DISABLE_COMPACT).

flags.label: Remote Memory Dir
flags.description: Alternative directory for memory/session data in remote mode.

flags.label: Resume From Session
flags.description: Hydrate context from a specific prior session ID.

flags.label: Resume Threshold
flags.description: Minutes since last message to trigger resume flow. Default 70.

flags.label: Resume Token Threshold
flags.description: Token count above which resume is offered. Default 100000.

flags.label: Skip Prompt History
flags.description: Skip loading previous prompt history at session start.

flags.label: Auto Connect IDE
flags.description: Auto-connect to IDE extensions on startup.

flags.label: IDE Host Override
flags.description: Override host address for IDE connections.

flags.label: Agent List In Messages
flags.description: Inject agent type/tool info into messages.

flags.label: Disable Advisor Tool
flags.description: Removes advisor tool definition from context.

flags.label: Disable Background Tasks
flags.description: Prevents background tasks that consume tokens.

flags.label: Disable Claude API Skill
flags.description: Skips registration of the built-in Claude API skill.

flags.label: Enable Prompt Suggestions
flags.description: AI-generated suggestions consume lightweight model calls.

flags.label: Token Usage Attachment
flags.description: Adds token usage stats per turn.

flags.label: Extra Body
flags.description: Extra JSON fields for API request body.

flags.label: Extra Metadata
flags.description: Extra metadata attached to API requests.

flags.label: Max Tool Concurrency
flags.description: Max parallel tool calls per turn.

flags.label: MCP Allowlist Env
flags.description: Allow all env vars to pass through to MCP servers.

flags.label: MCP Server Name
flags.description: Server name passed to MCP headersHelper subprocess.

flags.label: MCP Server URL
flags.description: Server URL passed to MCP headersHelper subprocess.

flags.label: Custom Headers
flags.description: Custom HTTP headers for API requests.

flags.label: Custom Model Option
flags.description: Custom model option in the CLI model picker.

flags.label: Custom Model Name
flags.description: Display name for custom model option.

flags.label: Default Haiku Model
flags.description: Override which model ID maps to 'haiku'.

flags.label: Haiku Model Name
flags.description: Display name for default Haiku model.

flags.label: Default Opus Model
flags.description: Override which model ID maps to 'opus'.

flags.label: Opus Model Name
flags.description: Display name for default Opus model.

flags.label: Default Sonnet Model
flags.description: Override which model ID maps to 'sonnet'.

flags.label: Sonnet Model Name
flags.description: Display name for default Sonnet model.

flags.label: Small/Fast Model
flags.description: Model for hooks, classifiers, utility ops.

flags.label: Small Model AWS Region
flags.description: AWS region for the small/fast model.

flags.label: Agent Cost Steering
flags.description: Enables cost-steering behaviour for sub-agent model selection.

flags.label: Always Enable Effort
flags.description: Forces effort control on all models, not just Opus/Sonnet.

flags.label: Disable Adaptive Thinking
flags.description: Switches from dynamic to fixed thinking budgets.

flags.label: Disable Fast Mode
flags.description: Prevents fast mode from being enabled.

flags.label: Disable Legacy Model Remap
flags.description: Prevents remapping of legacy model names.

flags.label: Disable Nonstreaming Fallback
flags.description: Disables fallback to non-streaming API calls.

flags.label: Disable Thinking
flags.description: Completely disables extended thinking. Eliminates all thinking tokens.

flags.label: Max Output Tokens
flags.description: Hard cap on output tokens per response.

flags.label: Subagent Model
flags.description: Model for all subagent tasks. 'haiku' or 'sonnet' saves cost.

flags.label: HTTP Proxy Port
flags.description: HTTP proxy port for host networking.

flags.label: SOCKS Proxy Port
flags.description: SOCKS proxy port for host networking.

flags.label: Skip Fast Mode Net Errors
flags.description: Skip network errors in fast mode.

flags.label: Accessibility
flags.description: Enables accessibility mode for screen readers.

flags.label: Brief Upload
flags.description: Compact upload path for file attachments.

flags.label: Commit Log
flags.description: Path or flag for commit log output during rendering.

flags.label: Disable Mouse
flags.description: Disables mouse input support in terminal UI.

flags.label: Scroll Speed
flags.description: Terminal scroll speed multiplier (max 20). Default 1 (3 on Windows).

flags.label: Syntax Highlight
flags.description: Controls syntax highlighting for code blocks.

flags.label: Plan Interview Phase
flags.description: Controls interview phase in plan mode.

flags.label: Anthropic AWS Base URL
flags.description: Custom base URL for Anthropic AWS backend.

flags.label: Anthropic AWS Workspace ID
flags.description: Required workspace ID for Anthropic AWS platform.

flags.label: Bedrock Mantle API Key
flags.description: API key for Bedrock Mantle backend.

flags.label: Bedrock Mantle Base URL
flags.description: Custom base URL for Bedrock Mantle.

flags.label: Vertex Project ID
flags.description: GCP project ID for Vertex AI.

flags.label: Use Anthropic AWS
flags.description: Route API calls through Anthropic's AWS platform (distinct from Bedrock).

flags.label: Use Bedrock
flags.description: Route API calls through AWS Bedrock.

flags.label: Use Mantle
flags.description: Route API calls through Mantle (managed access layer).

flags.label: Use Vertex
flags.description: Route API calls through Vertex AI.

flags.label: Remote Settings Path
flags.description: Path to settings file in remote mode.

flags.label: Sandbox Indicator
flags.description: Show visual indicator when sandbox is active.

flags.label: File Read Max Tokens
flags.description: Caps tokens from file reads. Default ~25,000.

flags.label: Use Native File Search
flags.description: Uses native file search implementation instead of CLI fallback.

flags.label: Don't Inherit Env
flags.description: Don't inherit parent shell env vars.

flags.label: Max Retries
flags.description: Max retry attempts for failed API calls.

flags.label: New Init
flags.description: Changes /init to create multiple CLAUDE.md files.

flags.label: Perforce Mode
flags.description: Enables Perforce VCS mode. Adjusts file-stat logic and injects Perforce context.

flags.label: Base Ref
flags.description: Base git ref for diff operations.

flags.label: Base Refs
flags.description: Multiple base git refs for diff operations.

flags.label: Emit Session State Events
flags.description: Emit session state events for SDK.

flags.label: Use PowerShell Tool
flags.description: Use PowerShell instead of Bash tool.
